name: pai-plugins
description: Pericak AI — Kyle Pericak's public plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: pai-workflows

plugins.name: game-dev-tools
plugins.description: Build mods for moddable games. Currently: Stellaris (Paradox / Clausewitz). Codifies the build-from-vanilla / symlink-deploy / preflight pattern from two shipped Workshop mods.
